5004.issue: [S5004] Plain setInterval() found in source files (src/lib/deviceManager.ts). Please use this.setInterval() or adapter.setInterval() instead.

5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (src/lib/deviceManager.ts, src/lib/protocol/base.ts, ...). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5054.issue: [S5054] method "setObject()" should be avoided. Please use "setObjectNotExists()" or "extendObject()" instead.

5060.issue: [W5060] Package "xmlbuilder" is listed in dependencies of [package.json](https://github.com/iobroker-community-adapters/ioBroker.shelly/blob/master/package.json) but not imported or required by any scanned source file. Dependency might be unused.

5601.issue: [S5601] i18n directory "admin/i18n" uses long format ({lang}/translations.json). Consider migrating to short format ({lang}.json) using "npm run translate convert".

5612.issue: [W5612] "admin/jsonConfig.json/items/_mqtt/items/port" attribute "label" uses key "Port" which is not found in the English translation file at "admin/i18n/en".
